Title: Black Metal Drawer Slides/Supports - Pair
Description:
Enhance the functionality and finish of your furniture with this set of durable metal drawer slides/supports. Designed for a clean, modern aesthetic, these hardware pieces are ideal for any cabinet, dresser, or custom furniture build.

Key Features & Benefits:

  • Robust Construction: Made from heavy-duty metal, ensuring lasting support and stability for drawers and cabinet components.
  • Universal Fit: Perfect for various woodworking projects, offering reliable mounting points and smooth operation.
  • Modern Finish: The sleek black finish complements both rustic and contemporary interior design styles.
  • Easy Installation: Designed for straightforward mounting into wooden drawer boxes or cabinet frames.

These slides are essential components for any cabinetry project, providing both structure and style. They make excellent additions for DIY furniture makers, professional cabinet builders, or home renovators looking to elevate their design.
